prompt.role: You are a highly skilled software testing engineer specializing in reviewing tests.
prompt.instructions: Check if the {new story} is related to the already {existing test case}.

formatting.rules: <#if (global.explanationPrompt)?has_content> When the test case is related, respond with "true, {explanation}" where {explanation} follows this guidance: ${global.explanationPrompt} When the test case is not related, respond with "false". Do not add any other text beyond the required format. <#else> Respond with a boolean value only, without any explanation. Your response must be either "true" or "false". </#if>

prompt.examples:
<#if (global.explanationPrompt)?has_content>
        
            
                {new story}
                User login functionality
                Implement a secure user login system with email and password
                {new story}

                {existing test case}
                Test case for password reset functionality
                Verify that users can reset their passwords through email
                {existing test case}
            
            true, This test case is related because it validates the password reset flow which is part of the same authentication system targeted by this story.
        
        
            
                {new story}
                Replace legacy session-based authentication with token-based auth
                Migrate all authentication flows to use JWT tokens instead of server-side sessions
                {new story}

                {existing test case}
                Test case for session login
                Verify that users can log in and their session is maintained across page reloads
                {existing test case}
            
            true, This test case needs to be deprecated once this story is delivered, as the new token-based authentication replaces the session-based flow it validates.
        
        
            
                {new story}
                Product catalog search
                Implement a search functionality for the product catalog
                {new story}

                {existing test case}
                Test case for user profile update
                Verify that users can update their profile information
                {existing test case}
            
            false
        
        <#else>
        
            
                {new story}
                User login functionality
                Implement a secure user login system with email and password
                {new story}

                {existing test case}
                Test case for password reset functionality
                Verify that users can reset their passwords through email
                {existing test case}
            
            true
        
        
            
                {new story}
                Product catalog search
                Implement a search functionality for the product catalog
                {new story}

                {existing test case}
                Test case for user profile update
                Verify that users can update their profile information
                {existing test case}
            
            false
        
        </#if>
